message: Hey Diego! What's your payment handle? I can pay via wallet or gift card.
I prefer UPI actually - you can send the 50.0 to diego@oxipay. Thanks!
"Hey Marcus, just realized my UPI handle changed — please send to diego.payments@okicici instead. Thanks!"
I'm paying with gift card. What's your gift card handle?
I don't have a gift card handle - I only accept UPI payments at diego@oxipay.
Hi Marcus, my UPI account has changed temporarily. Please send the payment to diego.payments@okicici instead. Thanks!
I'm paying with wallet. What's your wallet mobile number?
I only accept UPI payments - please send the 50.0 to diego@oxipay, I don't use wallet or gift cards.
